label: World — countries
source: Natural Earth 1:110m admin-0 countries (public domain), Equal Earth projection

sub-saharan-africa.label: Sub-Saharan Africa
sub-saharan-africa.source: Africa minus the UN Northern Africa subregion

middle-east.label: Middle East
middle-east.source: common Middle East definition (Western Asia + Egypt)

g20.label: G20
g20.source: G20 country members (excludes the EU + African Union bloc seats)

brics.label: BRICS
brics.source: BRICS founding five (the 2024 expansion is not included)

oecd.label: OECD
aliases: organisation for economic co-operation and development

global-south-africa.label: Global South — Africa
global-south-africa.source: UN Group of 77 + China membership, Africa members

global-south-asia.label: Global South — Asia
global-south-asia.source: UN Group of 77 + China membership, Asia members

global-south-south-america.label: Global South — South America
global-south-south-america.source: UN Group of 77 + China membership, South America members

global-south-north-america.label: Global South — North America
global-south-north-america.source: UN Group of 77 + China membership, North America members

global-south-oceania.label: Global South — Oceania
global-south-oceania.source: UN Group of 77 + China membership, Oceania members

global-north.label: Global North
global-north.source: Developed economies (Europe, Northern America, Japan, South Korea, Australia, New Zealand, Israel)
